dropHint: Click to choose or drop an audio / video file
dropSubHint: Supports mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, mkv and more
guideQuiet: Recorded in a quiet room, no background music or noise
guideSingle: A single speaker talking clearly, no crosstalk
guideDuration: 10+ seconds recommended; the best clip is picked automatically
guideTone: Natural, steady tone that matches your target dubbing style
modelMissingHint: The ZipVoice cloning model is not installed, so preview and dubbing won't work after creation. Please download it on the "TTS Services" page first.
analyzingLong: Long files may take up to a minute
crossLingualHint: Voice language ({{voiceLang}}) differs from subtitle language ({{textLang}}): synthesis works, but the cloned prosody will carry an accent. For best results clone from same-language audio
issueNoSpeech: No speech detected in the selection
issueTooShort: Only {{seconds}}s of speech; at least 3s is required
issueShortForEngine: {{seconds}}s of speech; {{ideal}}s+ is recommended for better results
issueLowSnr: High background noise (SNR ~{{db}}dB). Cloning quality may suffer; consider a quieter sample
issueClipping: Clipping detected in the recording; audio quality may be affected
issueLowVolume: Low volume; gain will be applied automatically
issueLowSpeechRatio: Low speech ratio ({{percent}}%); pick a segment with more continuous speech
issueLongSilence: Contains {{seconds}}s of long silence; it will be compressed automatically
textHint: Proofread carefully: cloning works best when the text matches the audio exactly
textPlaceholder: Type what is spoken in the selection…
transcribeUnavailable: No speech recognition engine available (no local model installed, no cloud ASR configured). Please listen and type manually
fromSubtitle: Prefilled from subtitles by selection time, please proofread
consent: I have permission from the voice owner and will use it lawfully
createdDesc: Compare the results. Not satisfied? Try another segment
sampleFailed: Preview sample failed to generate. You can retry later in TTS Services · My Voices
createVoiceHint: Clone your voice from a recording or video
linkEntryHint: Reattach cloned voices from your cloud account
emptyMyVoicesDesc: Create your own dubbing voice from a recording or video
panelIntro: A cloned voice is driven by its reference audio: every line is synthesized with this reference. The cleaner the reference, the better the result.
deleteDesc: The reference audio and preview sample will be removed. Dubbing lines using this voice can no longer be re-synthesized. This cannot be undone.
engineVolcDesc: Better quality; requires a paid speaker slot from the Volcengine console
engineVolcNeedProvider: Configure a Doubao instance on the TTS Services page first
engineElevenDesc: Great multilingual quality, ready right after upload (paid plan required)
engineElevenNeedProvider: Configure an ElevenLabs instance on the TTS Services page first
removeNoiseHint: ElevenLabs removes background noise on upload; leave off for clean recordings
elevenSlotHint: Uses one custom voice slot in your ElevenLabs account; deleting the voice also removes it from the cloud
speakerIdHint: Obtained after purchasing a slot in the Volcengine console (starts with S_); training credentials (APP ID / Access Token) are configured on the Doubao instance
denoiseHint: Removes background noise at a slight cost to similarity
mssHint: Recommended when the sample contains background music
creatingVolc: Uploading and training, usually done within a minute…
trainingSlowNotice: Still training: you can finish now and refresh later in TTS Services · My Voices
cueListTitle: Pick by subtitle line (click a line to absorb neighbors)
recTargetHint: Record at least {{seconds}}s, up to 5 minutes
recScriptTitle: Reading script (read along, or just talk about anything)
recScript: The weather is lovely today, with sunlight streaming through the window onto my desk. I plan to make myself a cup of hot tea and then go over my plans for the week. Lately I have been learning something new. The process takes patience, but I can feel a little progress every single day. On weekends I like to take a walk in the park, watch the scenery by the lake, and listen to the birds singing. It always helps me relax. In the evening I usually read a few pages of a book or watch a movie I enjoy. Life is really quite simple: take care of each small thing, and your mood naturally becomes brighter.
micDenied: Microphone access denied. Enable it in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone, then try again
linkTitle: Reclaim cloned voices from the platform
linkIntro: Cloud cloned voices are account assets: after a local delete or switching devices, reattach voices that still exist on the platform here—no re-upload or retraining needed.
linkEmpty: No instant cloned voices (IVC) in this account
linkVolcHint: Volcengine has no voice list API: enter the S_ slot ID from the console's Voice Clone page; validity and training status are checked automatically
deleteDescEleven: By default only the local record and files are deleted (the ElevenLabs cloud voice is kept and can be reclaimed anytime); dubbing lines using this voice can no longer be re-synthesized.
deleteCloudToo: Also delete the ElevenLabs cloud voice (frees an account slot, irreversible)
localDenoiseHint: Removes background noise (local GTCRN model) at a slight cost to similarity
